source: Faced with such a hostile environment, Chinese private entrepreneurs have been forced to engage in “institutional arbitrage” – taking advantage of efficient Western economic institutions to expand their business (most export-oriented businesses are owned by private entrepreneurs and foreign firms).
reference: 面临如此困难的环境，中国民营企业家被迫进行“制度套利”——利用高校的西方经济制度扩张业务（大部分出口导向企业为民营企业家和外国公司所有）。

source: 面临如此困难的环境，中国民营企业家被迫进行“制度套利”——利用高校的西方经济制度扩张业务（大部分出口导向企业为民营企业家和外国公司所有）。
reference: Faced with such a hostile environment, Chinese private entrepreneurs have been forced to engage in “institutional arbitrage” – taking advantage of efficient Western economic institutions to expand their business (most export-oriented businesses are owned by private entrepreneurs and foreign firms).

source: Since a common diagnosis of the problems generated in the financial services business holds that human greed is to blame, a German think tank recently suggested that people with a genetic proclivity to high dopamine levels should be barred from taking leading positions in financial institutions.
reference: 有一种普遍的看法是把金融行业产生的问题、归咎于人类的贪婪。最近，德国的一个智库提出，那些在基因中多巴胺荷尔蒙含量高的人不应该在金融机构里担任领导岗位。

source: 有一种普遍的看法是把金融行业产生的问题、归咎于人类的贪婪。最近，德国的一个智库提出，那些在基因中多巴胺荷尔蒙含量高的人不应该在金融机构里担任领导岗位。
reference: Since a common diagnosis of the problems generated in the financial services business holds that human greed is to blame, a German think tank recently suggested that people with a genetic proclivity to high dopamine levels should be barred from taking leading positions in financial institutions.

source: This post-agreement dynamic thus could play out in two ways. In the first scenario, events unfold according to the hopes of the P5+1 and the Iranian negotiators, with the agreement amplifying the voices of those in Iran who advocate regional and international accommodation.
reference: 因此，这一协议后动态具有两面性。在第一个情景中，事件根据P5+1和伊朗谈判者的希望展开，协议增强了支持地区和国际协调的伊朗人的声音。

source: 因此，这一协议后动态具有两面性。在第一个情景中，事件根据P5+1和伊朗谈判者的希望展开，协议增强了支持地区和国际协调的伊朗人的声音。
reference: This post-agreement dynamic thus could play out in two ways. In the first scenario, events unfold according to the hopes of the P5+1 and the Iranian negotiators, with the agreement amplifying the voices of those in Iran who advocate regional and international accommodation.

source: As Erhard himself would have argued, ordoliberalism is not a one-size-fits-all solution. But there can be no question that in today's globalized world, the economy – and perhaps politics as well – would benefit from the imposition of order.
reference: 艾哈德自己也会强调，秩序自由主义并非放之四海而皆准的解决办法。但当今的全球化世界、经济——也许还有政治——将受益于秩序的建立恐怕是毫无疑问的。

source: 艾哈德自己也会强调，秩序自由主义并非放之四海而皆准的解决办法。但当今的全球化世界、经济——也许还有政治——将受益于秩序的建立恐怕是毫无疑问的。
reference: As Erhard himself would have argued, ordoliberalism is not a one-size-fits-all solution. But there can be no question that in today's globalized world, the economy – and perhaps politics as well – would benefit from the imposition of order.

source: This whole tangle of debts was finally de facto written off in 1932 in the middle of the global slump. But, until 1980, Germany continued repaying the loans that it had incurred to pay the reparations.
reference: 1932年，在全球崩盘中，这一整条三角债链条事实上已经名存实亡。但是，直到1980年，德国还在为战争赔款偿还贷款。

source: 1932年，在全球崩盘中，这一整条三角债链条事实上已经名存实亡。但是，直到1980年，德国还在为战争赔款偿还贷款。
reference: This whole tangle of debts was finally de facto written off in 1932 in the middle of the global slump. But, until 1980, Germany continued repaying the loans that it had incurred to pay the reparations.

source: Israelis now seem to believe that their politicians can choose which problems should be solved and which should be ignored. As a result, they are bound to be disappointed.
reference: 如今，以色列似乎认为其政客可以选择解决什么问题，忽视什么问题。因此他们将注定失望。以色列领导人从来没有这样的选择余地。

source: 如今，以色列似乎认为其政客可以选择解决什么问题，忽视什么问题。因此他们将注定失望。以色列领导人从来没有这样的选择余地。
reference: Israelis now seem to believe that their politicians can choose which problems should be solved and which should be ignored. As a result, they are bound to be disappointed.

source: Global Warming’s Cheap, Effective Solution
reference: 解决全球变暖的便宜之计

source: 解决全球变暖的便宜之计
reference: Global Warming’s Cheap, Effective Solution

source: By contrast, the DSM-5 proposes to eliminate the bereavement exclusion. Anyone with depressive symptoms for just two weeks after suffering a significant loss would be diagnosed with major depressive disorder, massively pathologizing normal intense grief.
reference: 而反过来，第五版的手册却建议要取消这种排除条件。任何在丧亲后两周内有忧郁症状的人都将被诊断为重度忧郁症，将大多数正常的极度悲伤都定义为病态。

source: 而反过来，第五版的手册却建议要取消这种排除条件。任何在丧亲后两周内有忧郁症状的人都将被诊断为重度忧郁症，将大多数正常的极度悲伤都定义为病态。
reference: By contrast, the DSM-5 proposes to eliminate the bereavement exclusion. Anyone with depressive symptoms for just two weeks after suffering a significant loss would be diagnosed with major depressive disorder, massively pathologizing normal intense grief.

source: When Marijuana is Legal
reference: 当大麻合法化之时

source: 当大麻合法化之时
reference: When Marijuana is Legal

source: Nothing compels you to move, but if you do, you move forward. The faster you run, the more scenery you see – so you have some incentive to run fast.
reference: 做个类比很有用。垄断就像是在硬地上跑步。没人强迫你前进，但只要你行动，你就能前进。你跑得越快，看到的风景就越多，于是你就有了快跑的激励。

source: 做个类比很有用。垄断就像是在硬地上跑步。没人强迫你前进，但只要你行动，你就能前进。你跑得越快，看到的风景就越多，于是你就有了快跑的激励。
reference: Nothing compels you to move, but if you do, you move forward. The faster you run, the more scenery you see – so you have some incentive to run fast.

source: The first, following the collapse of the USSR, was almost cataclysmic – nothing in the shops, the country in bankruptcy, all savings lost. The other affected everyone but was less severe – Russia’s 1998 default, which saw a fourfold devaluation of the ruble.
reference: 我出生在20世纪60年代初，我那一代人经历了两场危机。第一场危机，是苏联倒台后的几乎一贫如洗——商店里什么东西都没有，国家破产了，人们所有的积蓄都没有了。另一场危机，影响了所有的人，但是没有前一场那么严重——俄罗斯1998年的经济危机，它见证了卢布四倍的贬值。俄罗斯当前的危机很严重，但是，人们却没有应对措施的任何线索。

source: 我出生在20世纪60年代初，我那一代人经历了两场危机。第一场危机，是苏联倒台后的几乎一贫如洗——商店里什么东西都没有，国家破产了，人们所有的积蓄都没有了。另一场危机，影响了所有的人，但是没有前一场那么严重——俄罗斯1998年的经济危机，它见证了卢布四倍的贬值。俄罗斯当前的危机很严重，但是，人们却没有应对措施的任何线索。
reference: The first, following the collapse of the USSR, was almost cataclysmic – nothing in the shops, the country in bankruptcy, all savings lost. The other affected everyone but was less severe – Russia’s 1998 default, which saw a fourfold devaluation of the ruble.

source: OXFORD – Many of the recent tributes for Margaret Thatcher following her death celebrated her as a “transformational” leader who brought about great changes. There were frequent references to her equally transformational American counterpart, Ronald Reagan.
reference: 牛津—玛格丽特·撒切尔去世后，很多最新纪念文章称赞她是带来伟大变革的“转型”领袖。经常被提到的还有她的美国转型同侪罗纳德·里根。但更有趣的比较是把她和另一位美国总统放在一起——老布什。

source: 牛津—玛格丽特·撒切尔去世后，很多最新纪念文章称赞她是带来伟大变革的“转型”领袖。经常被提到的还有她的美国转型同侪罗纳德·里根。但更有趣的比较是把她和另一位美国总统放在一起——老布什。
reference: OXFORD – Many of the recent tributes for Margaret Thatcher following her death celebrated her as a “transformational” leader who brought about great changes. There were frequent references to her equally transformational American counterpart, Ronald Reagan.

source: Coupled with our successful membership in the World Trade Organization, Ukraine would stand to benefit when world and European trade begins to recover. Europe can also consider using various stabilization funds to help our economy through the crisis that we are all enduring.
reference: 欧洲可以接纳我们正在谈判的自由贸易协定来对乌克兰给予帮助。再加上成功加入世界贸易组织，乌克兰将在欧洲贸易开始复苏的时候从中获得好处。欧洲还可以考虑使用各式稳定基金帮助我们的经济度过这场共同的危机。

source: 欧洲可以接纳我们正在谈判的自由贸易协定来对乌克兰给予帮助。再加上成功加入世界贸易组织，乌克兰将在欧洲贸易开始复苏的时候从中获得好处。欧洲还可以考虑使用各式稳定基金帮助我们的经济度过这场共同的危机。
reference: Coupled with our successful membership in the World Trade Organization, Ukraine would stand to benefit when world and European trade begins to recover. Europe can also consider using various stabilization funds to help our economy through the crisis that we are all enduring.
